theme_and_archetype.archetype: 1 (Organic & Earthy) - Modified for Cinematic Magical Realism
theme_and_archetype.core_aesthetic: Deep jungle ruins at night illuminated by bioluminescence and magic.
forbidden_elements: Inter, Roboto, or generic system fonts

glassmorphism.description: Frosted glass panels for question popups and level nodes.
glassmorphism.classes: bg-moss-dark/40 backdrop-blur-xl border border-t-cyan-mist/30 border-l-cyan-mist/30 border-r-stone-dark border-b-stone-dark shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,229,255,0.15)] rounded-2xl

carved_stone.description: Pure CSS carved stone borders for dialogue boxes and heavy UI.
carved_stone.classes: bg-stone-mid border-4 border-stone-dark rounded-xl shadow-[inset_4px_4px_8px_rgba(0,0,0,0.6),inset_-4px_-4px_8px_rgba(255,255,255,0.05),0_8px_16px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)] relative overflow-hidden
carved_stone.enhancement: Add a pseudo-element before/after with border-t-2 border-l-2 border-stone-light/20 to simulate the highlight of the bevel.

vine_border.description: Organic borders for HUD bars like XP.
vine_border.wrapper_classes: relative bg-moss-dark border-2 border-moss-light rounded-full overflow-hidden p-1 shadow-[inset_0_4px_8px_rgba(0,0,0,0.8)]
vine_border.fill_classes: h-full bg-gradient-to-r from-moss-light to-cyan-mist rounded-full relative
vine_border.overlay_svg: Overlay an SVG path with stroke-width 1 and stroke #2A3F2D (moss-light) forming twisting sine-wave shapes over the bar.

cyan_mist.css_animation: animate-[pan_10s_linear_infinite] bg-[length:200%_100%] bg-gradient-to-r from-transparent via-cyan-mist/10 to-transparent

world_map.layout: Vertically scrolling container (S-curve). Desktop uses max-w-md center column with side panel art.
world_map.nodes: 50 levels total, 5 zones. Boss nodes every 10 levels. Use absolute positioning with percentage top/left to form the S-curve.

small_level.layout: Playfield occupying upper 60%, Question Card lower 40%.
components: HUD (HP Gems, XP Bar, Relic Coins)

boss_level.layout: Cinematic split. Boss at top, player at bottom-left. Dialogue box spanning bottom.

component_library.layout: Bento grid presentation of all components.

sprite_sheet.specs: Aligned rows of characters, transparent backgrounds, clear boundaries, mono-spaced debug labels below each sprite.

desktop_scenery_approach.description: On desktop (1440x900), the mobile view (390x844) stays locked in the center as an interactive 'device'. The left and right margins fill with parallax scenery.
desktop_scenery_approach.left_panel: Giant carved jungle statues, cascading vines.
desktop_scenery_approach.right_panel: Luminescent waterfall falling into a misty abyss, glowing cyan plants.

nano_banana_prompts.name: world_map_bg
nano_banana_prompts.prompt: Cinematic vertical scrolling background of deep ancient jungle ruins, mossy stone carved pathways winding upwards, glowing cyan mist #00E5FF illuminating the darkness, bioluminescent flora, volumetric light shafts, deep earthy browns and mossy greens, magical realism, 2D game art style, highly detailed painterly texture.

nano_banana_prompts.name: boss_cavern_bg
nano_banana_prompts.prompt: Cinematic 2D game background of an underground ruin cavern, giant ancient carved stone deity face in the wall, glowing ember orange #FF6B35 lava fissures, cyan #00E5FF glowing runes, high contrast lighting, dark magical realism.

nano_banana_prompts.name: player_explorer
nano_banana_prompts.prompt: Sprite sheet pose of a chibi 2D explorer character with a bright red scarf, holding a glowing cyan magic lantern, thick black outlines, painterly texture, deep moss green clothing, cinematic lighting, transparent background.

nano_banana_prompts.name: stone_deity_boss
nano_banana_prompts.prompt: Sprite sheet pose of a giant Stone Deity Guardian boss monster, made of cracked mossy ruins, glowing ember orange #FF6B35 eyes and core, thick black outlines, chibi but menacing 2D game art style, transparent background.

nano_banana_prompts.name: desktop_waterfall_right
nano_banana_prompts.prompt: Cinematic jungle waterfall scenery, glowing cyan water flowing over dark stone ruins, volumetric lighting, magical realism game art.

attributes: All interactive elements MUST use data-testid
